steps.title: Find the rectangle length
steps.content:
The width is $9$ centimeters. The length is $45$ centimeters longer than the width:
$$9+45=54$$

steps.title: Compute the area
steps.content:
The area of a rectangle is length times width:
$$54\cdot 9=486$$
The rectangle has area $486$ square centimeters. The answer is D.
